prompt: I'm starting a new TypeScript API project with Express and Postgres. I want to set up my folder structure so Claude doesn't lose context when I switch between planning and writing code. Can you help me organize this?

assertions.text: Response includes a visual directory tree structure showing the full workspace layout
Response includes a CLAUDE.md template with a routing table (Task | Go to | Read columns or equivalent)
Response includes CONTEXT.md content for at least 2 individual stages (e.g. planning, src)
Response mentions token budgets, context efficiency, or context window scoping as a reason for the structure
Response includes Layer 3 reference files (_config/ or references/) separate from working directories
Response distinguishes between stable reference material and per-run working artifacts (factory vs product or equivalent concept)
